			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_10_0EAPbeta2_8740266_1126078506421_418534_4482' name='LibraryItem'>
				<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_10_0EAPbeta2_8740266_1126078506500_394385_4681' body='The library provides various types of items: books, periodical literature (journals, newspapers), audio and video records in various media formats, data CDs.&#10;All library items will have the following properties:&#10;·ID (assigned library code);&#10;·Title;&#10;·Description;&#10;·Keyword list;&#10;·Date registered;&#10;·Value (price);&#10;·Category (e.g. math, science fiction, mass media);&#10;·Indicator whether the item can be loaned.&#10;'>
					<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_10_0EAPbeta2_8740266_1126078506421_418534_4482'/>
				</ownedComment>
				<interfaceRealization xmi:type='uml:InterfaceRealization' xmi:id='_11_0_8740266_1142775051812_422389_1105'>
					<client xmi:idref='_10_0EAPbeta2_8740266_1126078506421_418534_4482'/>

						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2021x'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='JDK 5.0 Classes::java::io::Serializable' referentType='Interface'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</supplier>
					<contract href='Java_5_0_Profile.mdzip#_9_5_f720368_1110473546612_364919_7481'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2021x'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='JDK 5.0 Classes::java::io::Serializable' referentType='Interface'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</contract>
				</interfaceRealization>
